entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for resistance to the parasitic weed Striga hermonthica

entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A hemi-parasitic weed that parasitizes sorghum

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist infection and growth of Striga hermonthica

entities.name: LOW STIMULATION OF STRIGA SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: A specific mechanism of resistance where the host plant produces fewer stimulants for striga seed germination

entities.name: MECHANICAL RESISTANCE
entities.description: A specific mechanism of resistance to Striga hermonthica

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED POPULATIONS
entities.description: Genetic populations (RIP-1 and RIP-2) developed from sorghum crosses for mapping resistance

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to map resistance loci in sorghum

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: Country where field trials were conducted to evaluate striga resistance

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: Country where field trials were conducted to evaluate striga resistance

entities.name: AREA UNDER THE STRIGA NUMBER PROGRESS CURVE
entities.description: A quantitative metric (ASNPC) used to measure the level of striga resistance

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: A statistical method used to detect quantitative trait loci (QTL)

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions that influence the expression of striga resistance

entities.name: LGS
entities.description: A major-gene locus associated with the low stimulation of striga seed germination trait

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique using genetic markers to select for desired traits like striga resistance

relationships.target: LOW STIMULATION OF STRIGA SEED GERMINATION
